items.name: Jingle Bells - Text Bubble
items.description:
Bring the sound of holiday cheer with this 'Jingle Bells!' chat bubble! Decorated with golden bells, sparkling stars, and a bright star topper, it's perfect for sharing your joy and spreading Christmas spirit. Whether you're singing carols or just sharing some festive fun, this bubble adds a merry touch to any conversation.
